Version History Spike — US Code Title 1 (General Provisions)
============================================================

Source: OLRC USLM XML release points via Wayback Machine

Version 1: PL 113-21 (2013)
  File: usc01@113-21.xml (198,911 bytes)
  Sections: 40
  Total text: 91,758 chars
  docPublicationName: Online@113-21

Version 2: PL 118-158 (2024)  
  File: usc01.xml (278,510 bytes)
  Sections: 40
  Total text: 123,738 chars
  docPublicationName: Online@118-158

Differences:
  Added sections: 0
  Removed sections: 0
  Changed sections: 21 (52.5%)
  Unchanged sections: 19

Changed sections:
  /us/usc/t1/s1    — Words denoting number, gender, and so forth
  /us/usc/t1/s105  — Title of appropriation Acts
  /us/usc/t1/s106  — Printing bills and joint resolutions
  /us/usc/t1/s106a — Promulgation of laws
  /us/usc/t1/s106b — Amendments to Constitution
  /us/usc/t1/s111  — Repeals as evidence of prior effectiveness
  /us/usc/t1/s112  — Statutes at Large; contents; admissibility
  /us/usc/t1/s112a — US Treaties and Other International Agreements
  /us/usc/t1/s112b — US international agreements (non-binding)
  /us/usc/t1/s113  — "Little and Brown's" edition; slip laws
  /us/usc/t1/s201  — Publication and distribution of Code
  /us/usc/t1/s202  — Preparation and publication of Codes
  /us/usc/t1/s203  — District of Columbia Code
  /us/usc/t1/s204  — Codes and Supplements as evidence
  + 7 more sections with editorial/statutory note changes

Conclusion: GATE PASS
  - 2 distinct versions extracted with dates
  - Stable identifiers link versions to same sections
  - Text differences measurable and meaningful
  - Download via Wayback Machine works as fallback for OLRC geo-block
